title: RITES Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Resident Engineer, Quality Engineer Posts
description: The Rail India Technical and Economic Service (RITES) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 16 Resident Engineer, Quality Engineer, and Field Engineer posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the RITES Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentione...
